elements.text:
Actor Onboarding
- Generate Key Pair
- Create DID
- Store Public Key on Blockchain
- Private Key in Wallet

Governance
- Review Claim Templates
- Approve / Reject
- Maintain Claim Registry

Issuer
- Create Claim
- Send to Governance
- Use Approved Claims

Credential Issuance
- Verify Citizen
- Create Credential Payload
- Sign (JWS)
- Encrypt (JWE)
- Store Hash on Blockchain
- Send to Citizen

Citizen Wallet
- Receive Encrypted Credential
- Store Locally
- Private Key Controlled Decryption

Verifier
- Create Verification Request
- Generate QR Code

Citizen Wallet
- Scan QR
- View Requested Claims
- Select Attributes
- Optional ZKP
- Create Proof Payload
- Sign (JWS)
- Generate Session

Verifier Checks
- Fetch Proof
- Resolve DID
- Verify Signature
- Check Hash on Blockchain
- Check Revocation
- Validate Session

Blockchain Layer
- DID + Public Keys
- Credential Hash
- Revocation Status
- Claim Registry
